CalibrationData.desc: Calibration data for the motor controller.

fields.name: dc_min
fields.desc: Minimum Duty Cycle value corresponding to the minimum physical position of the motor.

fields.name: dc_max
fields.desc: Maximum Duty Cycle value corresponding to the maximum physical position of the motor.

fields.name: dc_deadband
fields.desc: Deadband width in Duty Cycle unit.

fields.name: feedback_min
fields.desc: Feedback value corresponding to the minimum physical position of the motor.

fields.name: feedback_max
fields.desc: Feedback value corresponding to the maximum physical position of the motor.

fields.name: feedback_noise
fields.desc: Feedback noise level in Volt (standard deviation).

fields.name: feedback_latency_ms
fields.desc: Latency between command and movement in ms.

fields.name: feedback_inverted
fields.desc: Flag indicating whether the feedback is inverted or not.

fields.name: max_speed
fields.desc: Maximum speed of the motor in range/s (range = [max bound - min bound]).

CalibrationData.name: CalibrationData

Vec3f.desc: A 3D vector with x, y, z components represented as floats.

fields.name: x
fields.desc: The x component of the vector.

fields.name: y
fields.desc: The y component of the vector.

fields.name: z
fields.desc: The z component of the vector.

Vec3f.name: Vec3f

Vec3i.desc: A 3D vector with x, y, z components represented as integers.

fields.name: x
fields.desc: The x component of the vector.

fields.name: y
fields.desc: The y component of the vector.

fields.name: z
fields.desc: The z component of the vector.

Vec3i.name: Vec3i

Vec2f.desc: A 2D vector with x, y components represented as floats.

fields.name: x
fields.desc: The x component of the vector.

fields.name: y
fields.desc: The y component of the vector.

Vec2f.name: Vec2f

Vec2i.desc: A 2D vector with x, y components represented as integers.

fields.name: x
fields.desc: The x component of the vector.

fields.name: y
fields.desc: The y component of the vector.

Vec2i.name: Vec2i

Quatf.desc: A quaternion with x, y, z, w components represented as floats.

fields.name: x
fields.desc: The x component of the quaternion.

fields.name: y
fields.desc: The y component of the quaternion.

fields.name: z
fields.desc: The z component of the quaternion.

fields.name: w
fields.desc: The w component of the quaternion.

Quatf.name: Quatf

Transformf.desc: A transformation consisting of a position and rotation, represented with float components.

fields.name: position
fields.desc: The position component of the transformation.

fields.name: rotation
fields.desc: The rotation component of the transformation.

Transformf.name: Transformf

CPUUsage.desc: Statistics about the CPU usage of the robot.

fields.name: core0
fields.desc: CPU usage percentage of core 0 (0-100).

fields.name: core1
fields.desc: CPU usage percentage of core 1 (0-100).

CPUUsage.name: CPUUsage

RAMUsage.desc: Statistics about the robot's memory usage.

fields.name: internal_total
fields.desc: Total number of bytes in internal RAM.

fields.name: internal_used
fields.desc: Number of bytes used in internal RAM.

fields.name: psram_total
fields.desc: Total number of bytes in PSRAM.

fields.name: psram_used
fields.desc: Number of bytes used in PSRAM.

RAMUsage.name: RAMUsage
